charge.label: Charge
charge.desc: Can attack and use its activated ability immediately upon summoning.

taunt.label: Taunt
taunt.desc: Enemies must attack this unit first.

divine_shield.label: Divine Shield
divine_shield.desc: Absorbs the first attack with no damage.

raid.label: Raid
raid.desc: Can attack an enemy creature immediately upon summoning (but not the hero).

convocations_multiples.label: Multi-Summon
convocations_multiples.desc: Summon: creates multiple tokens based on configuration.

loyaute.label: Loyalty
loyaute.desc: Summon: +1 ATK and +1 HP for each allied unit of the same race in play.

resistance.label: Resistance X
resistance.desc: Reduces damage taken by X (minimum 1 damage).

premiere_frappe.label: First Strike
premiere_frappe.desc: When this unit attacks, it deals its damage first; the opposing unit only strikes back if it survives.

berserk.label: Berserk
berserk.desc: Doubles its ATK if its current HP are below its original HP value (on the card).

drain_de_vie.label: Lifedrain
drain_de_vie.desc: Heals your hero for the damage dealt.

esquive.label: Dodge
esquive.desc: Automatically dodges the first attack received each turn.

poison.label: Poison
poison.desc: Wounded units lose 1 HP per turn.

augure.label: Omen
augure.desc: When this unit deals damage to the enemy hero, you draw a card.

bravoure.label: Valor
bravoure.desc: Doubles its damage (rounded up) against units with higher ATK than its own.

pillage.label: Plunder X
pillage.desc: Summon: the opponent discards X random cards from their hand.

riposte.label: Riposte X
riposte.desc: When this unit takes damage, deals X damage to the source of the attack (unit or hero).

rappel.label: Recall
rappel.desc: Summon: return a target card from your graveyard to your hand.

combustion.label: Combustion
combustion.desc: Summon: discard a card from your hand, then draw two cards.

terreur.label: Terror
terreur.desc: Enemy units lose 1 ATK while this card is in play.

pauvrete.label: Poverty X
pauvrete.desc: This unit loses ATK equal to the number of cards in the opponent's hand (X = opponent's hand size, dynamic).

armure.label: Armor
armure.desc: Reduces combat damage taken by half (rounded up); spell damage is not reduced.

commandement.label: Command
commandement.desc: Allied units of the same faction gain +1/+1.

fureur.label: Fury
fureur.desc: After taking damage, immediately attacks a random enemy unit (or the hero if none remain). Triggers at most once per turn.

double_attaque.label: Double Strike
double_attaque.desc: Offensive phase only: deals its ATK twice when attacking. The targeted unit strikes back normally.

invisible.label: Invisible
invisible.desc: Cannot be targeted by spells or enemy unit abilities.

canalisation.label: Channeling
canalisation.desc: While this unit is in play, your spells cost 1 less mana (minimum 1).

contresort.label: Counterspell
contresort.desc: Summon: counters the next enemy spell.

convocation.label: Summon X
convocation.desc: Summon: creates an X/X token of the indicated race.

malediction.label: Curse
malediction.desc: Summon: target an enemy unit; it is exiled at the end of the opponent's next turn.

necrophagie.label: Necrophagy
necrophagie.desc: Gains +1 ATK and +1 HP whenever a unit (allied or enemy) dies.

richesse.label: Wealth X
richesse.desc: Whenever any player discards a card from their hand, this unit permanently gains +X/+X.

sacrifice_demoniaque.label: Demonic Sacrifice X
sacrifice_demoniaque.desc: When this unit dies, randomly distributes X cost reductions (-1 mana each) among the Demons in your hand. A Demon cannot cost less than 1.

paralysie.label: Paralysis
paralysie.desc: Units damaged by this creature cannot attack or use active abilities until the end of their controller's next turn.

permutation.label: Permutation
permutation.desc: Battlecry: swap the current HP of two target units (one ally and one enemy).

persecution.label: Persecution X
persecution.desc: Whenever this unit attacks, deal X damage to the enemy hero.

pietinement.label: Trample
pietinement.desc: When this unit attacks a creature, excess damage (beyond the target's remaining HP) is dealt to the enemy hero.

catalyse.label: Catalysis
catalyse.desc: Battlecry: reduce the mana cost of all units of the same race in your hand by 1.

ombre_du_passe.label: Shadow of the Past
ombre_du_passe.desc: Battlecry: gain +1 ATK and +1 HP for each unit of the same race in your graveyard.

profanation.label: Desecration X
profanation.desc: Battlecry: exile the last X cards from your graveyard to grant up to +X/+X to the unit.

prescience.label: Prescience X
prescience.desc: Battlecry: draw cards until you have X cards in hand.

suprematie.label: Supremacy
suprematie.desc: Battlecry: gain +1 ATK and +1 HP for each card in your hand at the time of summoning.

divination.label: Divination
divination.desc: Battlecry: reveal the top 3 cards of your deck; place one on top and the other 2 at the bottom in any order.

savant.label: Savant
savant.desc: Battlecry: gain +1 ATK and +1 HP for each spell in your graveyard.

liaison_de_vie.label: Lifebond
liaison_de_vie.desc: Shares damage taken with the enemy hero.

ombre.label: Shadow
ombre.desc: Cannot be targeted or attacked until it takes an action (attack or ability).

sacrifice.label: Sacrifice
sacrifice.desc: Battlecry: destroy an ally to permanently gain its HP and ATK.

malefice.label: Hex
malefice.desc: On death, deal X damage to all units (allies and enemies), where X equals its ATK.

regeneration.label: Regeneration
regeneration.desc: Restores 2 HP at the start of your turn.

corruption.label: Corruption
corruption.desc: Convert a target enemy unit to your side until end of turn; it gains Traque until end of turn.

carnage.label: Carnage X
carnage.desc: On death: deal X damage to all units in play (allies and enemies).

heritage.label: Legacy X
heritage.desc: On death: each allied unit in play permanently gains +X ATK and +X HP.

mimique.label: Mimic
mimique.desc: Battlecry: copy all abilities of a target unit and permanently grant them to this unit.

metamorphose.label: Metamorphosis
metamorphose.desc: Battlecry: this unit becomes an exact copy (ATK / HP / abilities) of a target unit.

tactique.label: Tactics X
tactique.desc: Battlecry: permanently grant X chosen ability(ies) to a target allied unit.

exhumation.label: Exhumation X
exhumation.desc: Battlecry: resurrect a unit from your graveyard with a mana cost equal to or less than X.

heritage_du_cimetiere.label: Graveyard Legacy
heritage_du_cimetiere.desc: Battlecry: grant this unit the abilities of a target unit in your graveyard.

pacte_de_sang.label: Blood Pact
pacte_de_sang.desc: When this unit dies, summon two 1/1 tokens of its race.

souffle_de_feu.label: Fire Breath X
souffle_de_feu.desc: Deal X damage to all enemy units when attacking (e.g. Fire Breath 2 = 2 damage).

domination.label: Domination
domination.desc: Takes control of a random enemy unit upon summoning.

resurrection.label: Resurrection
resurrection.desc: Returns to play after death with 1 HP; loses the Resurrection ability upon return.

transcendance.label: Transcendence
transcendance.desc: Fully immune to enemy spells: cannot be damaged or affected by any spell, including area-of-effect spells.

vampirisme.label: Vampirism X
vampirisme.desc: Battlecry: steal X HP from a target enemy unit and add them to this unit's HP.

traque_du_destin.label: Fate Hunt X
traque_du_destin.desc: Battlecry: reveal the top X cards of your deck, take one into your hand and place the rest at the bottom in a random order.

sang_mele.label: Mixed Blood
sang_mele.desc: Gains +1 ATK and +1 HP for each different race type among your allies in play.

fierte_du_clan.label: Clan Pride
fierte_du_clan.desc: While this unit is in play, units of the same clan enter with +1/+1.

solidarite.label: Solidarity X
solidarite.desc: Battlecry: draw X cards if you control 2 other units of the same race.

cycle_eternel.label: Eternal Cycle
cycle_eternel.desc: On death: add a copy of this card to your deck; if drawn, put it directly into play.

martyr.label: Martyr
martyr.desc: On death: all your units of the same race in play permanently gain +1/+1.

instinct_de_meute.label: Pack Instinct X
instinct_de_meute.desc: Battlecry: gain +X ATK and +X HP if an allied unit of the same faction went from play to the graveyard this turn.

totem.label: Totem
totem.desc: This unit gains the abilities of all allied units of the same race in play.

appel_du_clan.label: Clan Call X
appel_du_clan.desc: Battlecry: put the first unit of the same clan with a cost equal to or less than X from the top of your deck into play for free.

appel_supreme.label: Supreme Call
appel_supreme.desc: Battlecry: add to your hand the highest mana cost unit of the chosen race remaining in your deck (random if tied).

rassemblement.label: Rally X
rassemblement.desc: Summon: reveal the top X cards of your deck; add all units of the same race to your hand and discard the rest.

selection.label: Selection X
selection.desc: Summon: reveal 3 random common cards with cost ≤ X from factions sharing this card's alignment (good/neutral/evil); add one to your hand. No cost limit if X is undefined.

selection_magique.label: Arcane Selection X
selection_magique.desc: Summon: reveal 3 random common spells with cost ≤ X from factions sharing this card's alignment (good/neutral/evil); add one to your hand. No cost limit if X is undefined.

renfort_royal.label: Royal Selection X
renfort_royal.desc: Summon: reveal 3 random cards from your limited editions (≥30 required; otherwise from commons of the same alignment) with cost ≤ X; add one to your hand. No cost limit if X is undefined.

lycanthropie.label: Lycanthropy X
lycanthropie.desc: Start of turn: transforms into an X/X token with Stalk.

relancer.label: Reroll X
relancer.desc: Summon: replay the last X spells cast with random targets.

tempete.label: Storm X
tempete.desc: Summon: deal X damage distributed randomly among enemy units.

cataclysme.label: Cataclysm X
cataclysme.desc: Summon: deal X damage to all creatures (allied AND enemy).

affaiblissement.label: Weaken -X/-Y
affaiblissement.desc: Summon: give -X ATK and -Y HP to a targeted enemy creature.

impact.label: Impact X
impact.desc: Deal X damage to a target (creature or hero, either side).

douleur.label: Pain X
douleur.desc: Summon: deal X damage to your hero.

concentration.label: Focus X
concentration.desc: Summon: replace each spell in hand with a random spell (any faction) costing X more; reduce the new spell's cost by X.

remontee.label: Comeback
remontee.desc: Return a targeted unit to its owner's hand.

renforcement_multiple.label: Multi-Strengthen
renforcement_multiple.desc: Grant +X/+Y to all your creatures of the selected race or clan.

entrainement.label: Training X
entrainement.desc: Grant +X/+X to your creatures of the same faction in hand.

conferer.label: Bestow
conferer.desc: Summon: grant a chosen ability to an allied unit (or to all of them).

declenchement.label: Trigger
declenchement.desc: Summon: replay once the triggered compound effects of other allies in play, for a fixed subset of triggers (enter / death / end of turn / return).

poison.label: Poison
poison.desc: Wounded units lose 1 HP per turn.

pillage.label: Pillage X
pillage.desc: The opponent discards X random cards from their hand.

appel_du_clan.label: Clan Call X
appel_du_clan.desc: Deploy for free the first unit of the same clan as this spell, with a cost equal to or less than X, from your deck.

appel_supreme.label: Supreme Call
appel_supreme.desc: Add to your hand the highest-cost creature of the chosen race remaining in your deck (random if tied).

rassemblement.label: Rally X
rassemblement.desc: Reveal the top X cards of your deck; add units of the same race as this spell to your hand and discard the rest.

rappel.label: Recall
rappel.desc: Return a creature from your graveyard to your hand.

exhumation.label: Exhumation X
exhumation.desc: Resurrect a creature (cost ≤ X) from your graveyard onto the battlefield.

selection.label: Selection X
selection.desc: Choose one card from 3 random commons with cost ≤ X (no limit if X is undefined), from factions of the same alignment as this spell, to add to your hand.

selection_magique.label: Magic Selection X
selection_magique.desc: Choose one spell from 3 random common spells with cost ≤ X (no limit if X is undefined), from factions of the same alignment as this spell, to add to your hand.

renfort_royal.label: Royal Selection X
renfort_royal.desc: Choose one card from 3 random cards from your limited editions (≥30 required; otherwise from commons of the same alignment) with cost ≤ X (no limit if X is undefined) to add to your hand.

relancer.label: Recast X
relancer.desc: Replays the last X spells cast with random targets.

impact.label: Impact X
impact.desc: Deal X damage to a target (creature or hero, either side).

deferlement.label: Surge X
deferlement.desc: Deal X damage to all enemy creatures.

siphon.label: Siphon X
siphon.desc: Deal X damage to a target and heal your hero for the same amount.

silence.label: Silence
silence.desc: Remove all keywords from a targeted creature.

affaiblissement.label: Weakening -X/-Y
affaiblissement.desc: Gives -X ATK and -Y HP to a targeted enemy creature.

guerison.label: Healing X
guerison.desc: Restores X HP to a target.

remontee.label: Recall
remontee.desc: Returns a targeted unit to its owner's hand.

renforcement_multiple.label: Mass Reinforcement
renforcement_multiple.desc: Grants +X/+Y to all your creatures of the selected race or clan.

entrainement.label: Training X
entrainement.desc: Grants +X/+X to your creatures of the same faction in hand.

concentration.label: Concentration X
concentration.desc: Replaces each spell in hand with a random spell (any faction) costing X more; the new spell's cost is reduced by X.

invocation_multiple.label: Mass Summon
invocation_multiple.desc: Creates multiple tokens as defined by the card's configuration.

tempete.label: Storm X
tempete.desc: Deals X damage split randomly among enemy units.

cataclysme.label: Cataclysm X
cataclysme.desc: Deals X damage to all creatures (allied AND enemy).

douleur.label: Pain X
douleur.desc: On cast, deals X damage to your hero.

target.both_all: to all units and the {side} hero

scatter.target_both: to a random {side} target (unit or hero)

choice.bounce: choose a creature to return to hand
choice.grant_keyword: choose a creature to grant the ability to

Elfes.description: Agile and stealthy. Masters of speed and evasion. Giant eagles fight among their ranks.

Nains.description: Sturdy and resilient. Masters of defense and tenacity.

Hobbits.description: Small but cunning. Evasion and mutual aid.

Hommes-Bêtes.description: Savage and ferocious. Strike fast, regenerate, and fly into a rage.

Élémentaires.description: Primal forces of nature. Each element brings its own fighting style.

Mercenaires.description: Soldiers of fortune with no allegiance. Versatile and available for any deck.

Orcs.description: A brutal horde. Fast and expendable goblins. Brutish and aggressive orcs. Resilient trolls. Swift wargs.

Morts-Vivants.description: Insatiable and corrupted. Resurrection and life drain.

Elfes Noirs.description: Devious and venomous. Poison, shadow, and corruption.

home.home_subtitle: One card. One legend. Your move.

landing.hero_sub: Forge your legend. Lead your faction. Write your own saga.
landing.hero_proof: Over 400 cards, free from your very first game
landing.f1_desc: Armies & Magic unites the strategy of iconic TCGs with mechanics built for today's champions.
landing.f2_title: Every card. From your first game.
landing.f2_desc: Classic mode is yours in full from the very start. Over 400 cards are yours from day one — free — to forge the deck that fits you.
landing.f3_title: Every Expert deck, a singular work.
landing.f3_desc: Limited-print cards make every Expert deck unique. A shared quota ensures only your strategy decides.
landing.f4_title: Mobile, at last worthy of the stakes.
landing.f4_desc: Tournaments rewarded with rare cards and cash prizes — a level of stakes once reserved for desktop TCGs.
landing.factions_sub: Each race walks its own path. Which will be yours?
landing.showcase_sub: From the humblest creature to mythic heroes, every card matters.
landing.cta_sub: Join the summoners on the battlefield.

halflings.name: Le Pacte des Bois
halflings.tagline: Small in stature, grand in heart

auction.title: Auction House
auction.commission_info: Fee: {rate}% will be deducted from the sale amount
auction.error_buyout_too_low: Buyout price must be higher than the starting bid
auction.submit_sell: List for sale ({count, plural, =1 {# card} other {# cards}})

auth.forgot_email_required: Enter your email before requesting a password reset.
auth.forgot_email_sent: A password reset email has been sent to {email}. Check your inbox (and your spam folder).
auth.forgot_send_error: Unable to send the password reset email.
auth.password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
auth.reset_sub: Choose a new password for your account.
auth.reset_link_invalid: Reset link expired or invalid. Go back to the login page and request a new email.

common.concede_hint: Click again to confirm · auto-cancel in 5s
common.rotate_device_hint: Armies & Magic is played in landscape mode. Turn your device sideways to continue.

forge.discard_cost_title: Discard {count, plural, one {# card} other {# cards}}
forge.sacrifice_cost_title: Sacrifice {count, plural, one {# creature} other {# creatures}}
forge.scatter_points_hint: X ({x}) points scattered randomly across the pool
forge.reference_image_hint: Influences pose / composition / mood. Prompt style always takes priority.
forge.life_cost_hint: Life points paid by the hero on summon. The card cannot be played if doing so would reduce HP to 0.
forge.discard_cost_hint: Number of cards the player must discard from hand to play this card.
forge.sacrifice_cost_hint: Number of allied creatures the player must sacrifice to play this card.
forge.extra_context_placeholder: E.g. holds a flaming sword, menacing gaze, seen from behind, reddish fog, golden armor…
forge.ai_no_prompt: The AI returned no prompt — check ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and server logs
forge.no_ability_add_effect: No abilities. Add an effect or an ability to confer below.
forge.confer_ability_to_unit: Confer an ability to a unit
forge.generate_to_save: Generate or enter a card in ⚒ Forge to save.
forge.auto_prompt_placeholder: Click "Auto-prompt" to generate, or write your own...
forge.card_back_name_placeholder: Ex: Guardian of the Ancient Woods
forge.frame_hint: The frame is applied after generation. The AI can focus on the illustration alone — no frame to draw.
forge.card_back_instructions_placeholder: Ex: golden runes, feathers, polished mirror, coiled dragon...
forge.reference_image_hint2: Used as visual inspiration (subject / palette / mood). Prompt rules always take priority.
forge.board_style_surface: Terrain only (grass, snow, sand, stone…) filling the entire frame. No scenery, no border — ideal for a pure atmosphere render.
forge.board_style_minimal: Board center left empty (flat surface), decoration along the edges. Designed for 3D miniatures.
forge.board_style_mtgo: MTG Arena layout: clean center, décor restricted to side panels. In-game: large clickable graveyard tile on the left, hero + deck + mana + HP on the right (mirrored for opponent). Automatically enables the MTGO layout.
forge.board_style_hearthstone: Hearthstone layout: thematic props throughout, ornate central divider.
forge.graveyard_image_hint: Image displayed as the clickable graveyard tile. If no image is provided, a default coffin will be shown.
forge.default_board_hint: Default board (used when the deck does not specify one)
forge.board_instructions_placeholder: E.g.: cyberpunk atmosphere with purple neon lights, heavy rain, reflections on a metallic floor…
forge.board_instructions_hint: Replaces the subject/environment block of the prompt if filled in. Composition rules (Hearthstone, 16:9, symmetry, framing) always apply.
forge.reference_image_hint3: Used as visual inspiration (subject / palette / mood). Composition rules take priority.
forge.ability_polymorph: 🔀 Polymorphic ability — the icon will be saved for both the creature AND the spell.
forge.icon_instructions_placeholder: E.g.: favor a lightning bolt, a stylized skull...
forge.reference_image_hint4: Used as visual inspiration for the subject only; all style constraints (background, silhouette, palette…) are preserved.
forge.variants_check_save_hint: VARIANTS (click to check the ones to save — multiple allowed)
forge.no_icon: No icon. Start by generating one above.
forge.no_format_found: No format found. Make sure the "formats" table has been created and populated.
forge.panel_mana_rarity: RARITY DISTRIBUTION BY MANA COST (BULK MODE)
forge.budget_algo_desc: The algorithm first allocates ATK (45% of the remaining budget), then DEF (55%), then attempts to add abilities until the budget runs out. Faction multipliers (ATK weight, DEF weight) adjust the roll ranges.
forge.no_dated_card: No dated forged card found in the database.
forge.select_card_for_copies: Select a card to view its copies
forge.icons_saved_partial: {ok} icon(s) saved, but errors on the others: {error}
forge.backs_saved_partial: {ok} back(s) saved, but errors on the others: {error}
forge.boards_saved_partial: {ok} board(s) saved, but errors on the others: {error}
forge.validation_convocation_x: Convocation X: select a token in the picker before saving.
forge.validation_convocation: Summon: select a token in the picker before saving.
forge.validation_multi_convocation: Multiple Summons: add at least one token to the list before saving.
forge.validation_lycanthropie: Lycanthropy X: select a transformation token before saving.
forge.validation_entraide: Mutual Aid (Race): select the target race before saving.
forge.validation_appel_supreme: Supreme Call: select the target race before saving.
forge.validation_multi_convocation_spell: Multiple Summons (spell): add at least one token to the list before saving.
forge.validation_convocation_spell: Summon (spell): select a token in the picker before saving.

game.persist_warning: An action could not be saved — desync risk. Reload the page to resynchronize.
game.drag_hint: Drag your cards here to play them
game.selection_subtitle: Choose a card to add to your hand
game.power_close_hint: Esc or click outside to close
game.divination_traque_subtitle: Choose a card to take into your hand. The rest will go to the bottom of the deck.
game.divination_subtitle: Choose a card to place on top of your deck
game.graveyard_select_prompt: Choose a card from the graveyard
game.graveyard_hint_touch: Tap a card to zoom · tap again to view description
game.graveyard_hint_hover: Hover over a card to zoom · right-click to toggle image / description
game.tactique_subtitle: {count, plural, one {Choose # ability to transfer} other {Choose # abilities to transfer}}
game.convocation_subtitle: Choose the race of the token to summon
game.queue_no_valid_deck: You need at least one valid deck (50 cards) to play.
game.queue_no_deck_for_format: No deck for this format. Create one in the deck builder.

tutorial.page_eyebrow: Master the Art of the Duel
tutorial.page_subtitle: Armies & Magic — medieval fantasy card duels
tutorial.turn_intro: At the start of each of your turns, in order:
tutorial.combat_see_full_list: The full ability list is at the bottom of the page.
tutorial.lexicon_subtitle: Complete reference, always up to date with the game. "X" and "Y" are values set on each card.

deck.alignment_incompatible: Good and Evil alignments are incompatible
deck.deck_exact_size: The deck must contain exactly {size} cards (currently {current})
deck.illegal_cards: Cards not allowed in this format: {cards}
deck.choose_faction_first_tab: First choose a faction in tab 1 · Preparation.
deck.faction_hint: Mono-faction + Mercenaries. Changing faction removes incompatible cards/heroes.
deck.mana_curve_tooltip: {label} mana: {count, plural, one {# card} other {# cards}}
deck.decks_in_armory: {count, plural, one {# deck} other {# decks}} in your armory
deck.decks_in_format: {count, plural, one {# deck} other {# decks}} in this format

cardBacks.title: My Card Backs
cardBacks.subtitle: {visible, plural, one {# visible} other {# visible}} · {prints, plural, one {# print owned} other {# prints owned}}
